SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.queue

Class QueuePayloadCodec

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.queue.QueuePayloadCodec
final class QueuePayloadCodec extends Object
Encodes queue payloads using a compact RelaySession format with a Java serialization fallback.
